title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

desc: Amir, a young man, tries to dodge the police after they raid one of his drug dealings. The situation becomes more complicated when his sister gets imprisoned while trying to save him.

title: Mantra
